valid: For the period 18:00 (UTC) on Sat 09 May 2026 to 18:00 (UTC) on Sun 10 May 2026
general_synopsis: Low north Trafalgar 998 expected south FitzRoy 1003 by midday tomorrow. New low moving steadily southeast, expected Fair Isle 1014 by same time
